arts.ttl: Arteta u-turn gives Arsenal incredible €80m transfer saving
arts.sum: Kiwior has proven he can be relied on for depth when Arsenal need him most and, having also displayed the versatility to play at left-back, Arteta could be justified in keeping the defender around for another season. Arsenal ’s transfer plans could have taken a late alteration after recent developments could see Mikel Arteta save as much as €80 million on one of his reported summer targets.

arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho is reportedly still expected to leave the club this summer, according to journalist Fabrizio Romano. Posting on his official account on X, formerly Twitter, Romano provided an update on Jorginho’s future as the Italy international has an offer on the table from Flamengo. arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard Arsenal team news hint for Crystal Palace as PSG plan clear
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta could again go close to full strength for Arsenal's Premier League clash against Crystal Palace at Emirates Stadium on Wednesday evening. That would then see Mikel Merino drop back into midfield and Leandro Trossard come in as the false 9, flanked by Martinelli and Bukayo Saka.

arts.ttl: Palace to face Brighton in PL2 play-off
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s will take on rivals Brighton & Hove Albion on Monday, 28th April (19:00 BST) at the VBS Community Stadium.
